title: Backfill full current-season MLB completed-game stats into the canonical store
objective: Build the narrow backfill path that loads season-to-date completed MLB stats into the canonical store defined by the foundation spec.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode rebuild work. No live model implementation or strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Invent a storage target different from the approved spec
Open updater logic in the same task
required_work: 1. Implement a season-to-date backfill path using the approved stats foundation spec.
2. Fetch completed MLB games for the current season so far.
3. Persist raw entities into the canonical raw store.
4. If normalized derivatives are part of the approved spec, generate only the approved normalized layer.
5. Make the backfill rerunnable without corrupting or duplicating the canonical store.
acceptance_criteria: Season-to-date completed MLB coverage is backfilled into the canonical raw store
Output matches the approved storage/schema target
Rerun safety / dedupe behavior is documented
